seo.title: Platform | Open Frontier
seo.description: Explore practical model capabilities for coding, analysis, drafting, and workflow automation.

hero.title: A model platform built for clear reasoning and reliable execution.
hero.subtitle: Use one interface for drafting, coding, planning, and tool-driven automation across your team.

items.title: Technical reasoning
items.description: Solve multi-step tasks in engineering, analytics, and planning with coherent intermediate reasoning.

items.title: Code generation and review
items.description: Draft implementation options, explain tradeoffs, and enforce style and safety constraints.

items.title: Structured outputs
items.description: Emit stable JSON contracts and schema-aware responses for integration into backend systems.

items.title: Long-session reliability
items.description: Sustain context across deep sessions without losing objective, policy, or formatting fidelity.

items.title: Multimodal understanding
items.description: Combine text and visual references to support richer analysis and workflow automation.

items.title: Safer defaults
items.description: Designed with explicit handling for misuse resistance and constrained generation patterns.

panels.title: Integrate with your existing stack
panels.body: Keep your current architecture while adding AI capabilities through API, gateway, and tool orchestration layers.

panels.title: Governance without friction
panels.body: Set role-based access, model permissions, and data controls in one policy layer used across teams.

sections.heading: Move from demos to durable AI features
sections.text: Use the same workflow in local development, staging, and customer-facing production.
